headline: CYH Completes Sale of Four Arkansas Hospitals for $110M to Lower Debt
summary: Community Health sells four Arkansas hospitals for $110M, extending its asset-sale aimed at boosting liquidity, cutting debt and sharpening its healthcare portfolio.

headline: Accuity Names Hannah Hartung Chief Operating Officer to Drive Operational Scale and Performance
summary: Accuity, an AI-driven clinical revenue integrity partner for leading health systems, has named Hannah Hartung Chief, Operating Officer. She will lead the company's operational strategy and execution across delivery functions, driving scalable performance as Accuity continues expanding its partnerships with health systems nationwide.

headline: Centene, Deckers and 14 Other ‘Dividend Hopefuls’
summary: These large-cap companies could be poised to join the dividend club, based on cash holdings and free-cash flow yield, according to Morgan Stanley.
